case_title: PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: BRIAN M WONG) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RICHARD DONAHUE, OWNER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PHILIOSOPHER'S CLUB, REPRESENTED BY RICHARD DONAHUE, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY, ASSISTANT CHIEF OF CLAIMS IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLYLIABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: BRIAN CAULEY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILOSOPHER'S CLUB AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
